CKV_K8S_1.description: Using the 'latest' tag for container images can lead to unpredictable behavior and potential security risks. It is recommended to specify a specific version or tag for container images.

CKV_K8S_2.description: Running containers in privileged mode can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using privileged containers unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_3.description: Running containers as root can pose security risks. It is recommended to run containers with a non-root user whenever possible.

CKV_K8S_4.description: Enabling host networking can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using host networking unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_5.description: Host PID namespace can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using host PID namespace unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_6.description: Host IPC namespace can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using host IPC namespace unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_7.description: AllowPrivilegeEscalation can pose security risks. It is recommended to set AllowPrivilegeEscalation to false unless absolutely necessary.

CKV_K8S_8.rule_name: Container running in privileged security context
CKV_K8S_8.description: Running containers in a privileged security context can pose security risks. It is recommended to avoid using privileged security contexts unless absolutely necessary.
